description: A practical and stylish choice of bag in pink from kiara.  Extra roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth leather effect fabric and smart handles will give a sophisticated look to any outfit.Height: 25cmWidth: 32cmDepth:11cmMade of synthetic leather for durabilityHas one large main zipped compartment with two internal zipped pockets and internal slot pocketsTwo short handles for carrying ease and alternate long strapSmall zipped pocket on backMetal stud feet at the baseStylish, easy to grip, synthetic leather zip pullsCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
